title: Design System: C. Saint-Girons — AI Law & Legal Intelligence

display.purpose: Hero and page titles — the single moment of scale, Bricolage Grotesque uppercase.

shadows.name: inset-highlight
shadows.purpose: Lit top edge that makes glass read as glass.

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: Default easing for reveals, lifts, and the active-nav pill.

motion.name: sheen-sweep
motion.purpose: Hover light-band sweep across signature glass surfaces.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single solid element on a glass field — used for the main action (e.g. Notes, Explore the Hub).
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary">Notes<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="16" height="16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M5 12h14M13 6l6 6-6 6"/></svg></button>

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Glass pill for secondary actions; translucent over the stone body.

components.name: Section Kicker
components.description: Gold mono kicker above section headings — a hairline gold rule plus tracked label.

components.name: Glass Card
components.description: Floating frosted panel — the core container for entry points and content blocks.
components.html: Notes
components.css: .ds-card{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:1rem;background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,.56),rgba(255,255,255,.3));-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(22px) saturate(120%);backdrop-filter:blur(22px) saturate(120%);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.48);box-shadow:inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.7),0 24px 60px rgba(15,15,15,.06);border-radius:2rem;padding:1.5rem;transition:transform .3s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1),box-shadow .3s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1)}.ds-card:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.7),0 28px 80px rgba(15,15,15,.08)}.ds-card-icon{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:2.75rem;height:2.75rem;border-radius:1rem;background:rgba(154,107,31,.12);color:#7c5214}.ds-card h3{margin:0;font-family:'Bricolage Grotesque',sans-serif;font-size:1.6rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:-.05em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#111}

components.name: Nav Item (active)
components.description: Top-bar navigation item: icon + short label, active state carries a single soft pill.
components.html: HomeHub

narrative.overview: A legal-intelligence instrument, not a vitrine. The interface behaves like a calm command post: precise, instrumental, futuristic — but it never raises its voice. Authority is signaled through restraint. Surfaces are light and glassy; type is ink-dark and editorial; a single gold accent acts like a status light on an otherwise quiet console. It rejects the flashy SaaS startup register, the generic navy-and-serif law-firm template, and neon/crypto glow. Futurism is carried by typography, light/glass materials, and exact spacing — not loud color. Motion is purposeful, fast, eased, and always has a reduced-motion fallback.
keyCharacteristics: Light, warm-neutral body with frosted-glass panels floating above it.
Ink-dark editorial typography; one geometric display face for presence.
A single gold/bronze accent used as a signal, never as decoration.
Status semantics are explicit: live is green, verification is labeled — never color alone.
Restrained, eased motion; a subtle hover sheen as the signature flourish.

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: Signal Gold appears on ≤10% of any screen. If it's carrying more than kickers, focus, and a few marks, it has stopped being a signal.

rules.name: The Status-Never-Color-Alone Rule
rules.body: Verified / binding / live states always pair the color with a label or icon. Color is the echo, not the message.

rules.name: The Display-Once Rule
rules.body: One display moment per viewport. The title earns the scale; everything else steps down hard.

rules.name: The Float-Not-Stamp Rule
rules.body: Shadows are wide and faint (blur ≥ 24px, alpha ≤ 0.08). A tight dark shadow makes it look like a 2014 app.

dos: Do keep Signal Gold (#9a6b1f) to ≤10% of any screen — kickers, focus rings, a few marks.
Do float panels on wide, faint shadows (blur ≥24px, alpha ≤0.08) with an inset top highlight.
Do pair every status color with a label or icon (verified, binding, live).
Do give one display moment per viewport in Bricolage Grotesque; step everything else down.
Do ship a prefers-reduced-motion fallback for every animation, including the sheen.
Do cap body measure at 65–75ch and keep body text ≥4.5:1 contrast.
donts: Don't drift into the flashy SaaS startup look: no purple gradients, no 'Get started free' energy, no emoji, no inflated claims.
Don't fall back to the generic navy-and-serif law-firm template.
Don't use neon / crypto 'hacker' glow or decorative glassmorphism everywhere — glass is purposeful, not default.
Don't overload: no walls of text, no identical card grids, no everything-at-one-level density.
Don't use a colored border-left/border-right stripe as an accent — full hairline borders only.
Don't convey verified/binding/live by color alone.
